case_title: ROCOCO HARMONY INC. VS RUDIN, ALLA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ROCOCO HARMONY INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RUDIN, ALLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-28-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-11-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TO BE HEARD BY COMM. ROSEN PARKS PER DEFT'S REQUEST. DID NOT SIGN THE WAIVER.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF ROCOCO HARMONY INC.
COURT COSTS. IF FURNITURE IS DELIVERED BY FEB. 10, 2005 THEN JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF FOR $0 AMOUNT AND COSTS ONLY.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RUDIN, ALLA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ROCOCO HARMONY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-05-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-16-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. DEFT TO RETURN ALL FURNITURE REC'D TO PLTF BY 2/5/05. DEFT TO BEAR ALL DELIVERY COSTS. IF DEFT FAILS TO DELIVER FURNITURE THEN JUDGMENT ENTERED FOR PLTF IN THE AMOUNT OF $5000 +
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-16-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-28-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROCOCO HARMONY INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUDIN, ALLA $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22.00, DEFENDANT COMPLIED WITH THE TERMS OF THE 1-05-05 COURT ORDER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT RUDIN, ALLA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT ROCOCO HARMONY INC. $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $32.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
